_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of therapeutic sensitivities in a spheroid drug combination screen of Neurofibromatosis Type I associated High Grade Gliomas.

_contextSnippet: None of the combinations worked synergistically in the human TM-31 line (12 additive and 1 antagonistic combination)
details: None of the drug combinations worked synergistically (12 additive and 1 antagonistic combination)
